title: Upon Gorgonius.
content:
Unto Pastillus rank Gorgonius came
    To have a tooth twitched out of's native frame;
    Drawn was his tooth, but stank so, that some say,
    The barber stopped his nose, and ran away.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Gorgonius."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
